visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit office hallway with marble-patterned floors, a young man wearing a vibrant red knit sweater and white trousers approaches a woman. She wears a black corporate-style jacket and holds a large, silver-colored meat cleaver mock-up. The man gestures frantically towards her while smiling, and the woman maintains a neutral expression while listening. (2) The scene shifts to the interior of an airplane cabin with blue seats. The man, now in a dark gray sweatshirt, is seated by the window. He has his eyes squeezed shut and head tilted back, mimicking an expression of severe fatigue or illness. The lighting is natural and bright from the cabin windows. (3) Inside a public transit train, the man is dressed in a black and white horizontal striped sweater and a black beanie. He hugs his chest and shivers, portraying a feeling of being cold. The background shows blurred windows and other passengers' seats. (4) The man stands in a bright, modern shopping environment in front of an ABC-MART shoe store. He wears the same striped sweater and white pants with a green crossbody bag. He looks directly at the camera with a playful expression. The setting is clean and well-lit with various shoe displays visible. (5) A close-up shot features a hand holding a rectangular card with a colorful graphic of a manhole cover, featuring cherry blossoms and Japanese text. The background is a slightly blurred street scene. The focus is sharp on the card, showing intricate details. (6) Inside a hobby or toy store filled with stacks of Dragon Ball and anime figure boxes, the man holds several lottery prize packets towards the camera. He has a broad, satisfied smile. The lighting is standard bright retail fluorescent lighting. (7) Standing outdoors under a magnificent yellow ginkgo tree, the man holds a single fallen yellow leaf. He mimics smelling or tasting the leaf with an exaggerated, comedic expression. The background shows a sidewalk with vending machines and bright natural daylight. (8) The man stands in front of the Hanshin Koshien Stadium entrance, which features a large stone sign and a 'CHAMPIONS' banner. He wears the striped sweater and beanie, looking around at the iconic sports venue. The lighting is clear daylight. (9) Inside a brightly lit clothing store fitting room, the man takes a mirror selfie using his smartphone. He holds a folded white sweatshirt against his chest to check the fit. The room has neutral-colored walls and a large mirror reflecting his upper body. (10) A close-up shot focuses on a bowl of steaming ramen. A pair of chopsticks lifts a large portion of thin noodles from the brown broth, which is garnished with sliced pork belly, bamboo shoots, and green onions. The lighting is warm and indoor. (11) In a restaurant with traditional Japanese decor, the man is seen eating the ramen and a side of fried rice. He brings a large mouthful of noodles to his face with enjoyment. The background includes menus and other diners' tables. (12) A high-angle close-up displays a red lacquer box filled with white rice and topped with two large pieces of grilled unagi eel. The eel is glazed with a dark, shiny sauce and looks succulent. The focus is sharp on the texture of the fish. (13) The man is shown again in the restaurant, holding the unagi box and taking a large bite. His eyes are slightly closed in satisfaction. The background shows blurred restaurant patrons and signage in Japanese. (14) A close-up features a piece of golden-brown fried chicken in a striped paper sleeve and a plastic cup of iced coffee with a straw. The man's hand holds the items in a bright, modern convenience store setting. (15) Sitting at a table in a convenience store, the man bites into the fried chicken while holding the coffee. He looks at the camera with a content expression. Vending machines and posters are visible in the background. (16) The man stands on a city street in front of a large, traditional-looking sign for 'Kobe Beef' in Japanese characters. He looks tired but determined. The street is lined with shops and the lighting is slightly overcast. (17) At a Japanese shrine with red wooden structures, the man stands before the main altar. He performs a traditional prayer, bowing his head and clasping his hands together. The setting is peaceful with traditional temple architecture. (18) The man stands next to a large tree adorned with numerous wooden prayer plaques hanging from ropes. He looks towards the shrine building in the distance. The ground is covered with fallen red and yellow autumn leaves. (19) On a wide city sidewalk lined with vibrant yellow ginkgo trees, the man walks toward the camera. He carries a large white shopping bag in his hand and smiles broadly. The urban skyline is visible in the background under clear daylight.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: POV：教你如何跟公司請病假. (2) [Subtitle]: 鴨姐鴨姐！想跟你請兩天特休. (3) [Subtitle]: 不行！你今年滿了. (4) [Subtitle]: 病假！我請病假！. (5) [Subtitle]: 不能開玩笑 生病要趕快去看醫生 😅. (6) [Subtitle]: 先看清楚醫生開的處方箋. (7) [Subtitle]: 醫生說要先抽一番賞壓壓驚. (8) [Subtitle]: 如果抽到爛東西就沒用. (9) [Subtitle]: 醫生說要去看黃色植物聞聞銀杏. (10) [Subtitle]: 去棒球場走走運動運動. (11) [Subtitle]: 天涼了記得要買暖和的新衣服. (12) [Subtitle]: 再吃拉麵暖和一下. (13) [Subtitle]: 醫生還說需要吃鰻魚飯. (14) [Subtitle]: 和超商炸雞跟咖啡. (15) [Subtitle]: 如果不夠 再用神戶牛補蛋白質. (16) [Subtitle]: 最後記得去拜拜才能永保健康. (17) [Subtitle]: 看完醫生好像比較好了 🥹 可以繼續活下去了 🥹

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female coworker at start, and a few distant passers-by in city scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian man with short brown hair, wearing a red sweater or a black and white striped sweater, white pants, and a black beanie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Diverse Japanese urban locations including an office hallway, airplane cabin, subway car, ABC-MART store, a hobby shop, ginkgo-lined streets, Hanshin Koshien Stadium, various restaurants, and a Shinto shrine.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy interaction in a quiet indoor space. A male voice speaks loudly and excitedly in Mandarin, requesting special leave. His voice is clear and has a sharp pitch contour. A female voice responds in a lower, calm tone, rejecting the request. (2) The male voice dramatically increases in volume and arousal, shouting 'Sick leave!' repeatedly with high vocal tension and a wide pitch range. The delivery is comedic and exaggerated. The speech rate is fast and forceful, dominating the audio mix with no background music yet present. (3) An upbeat pop-rock song fades in and becomes the dominant audio track. It features a bright acoustic guitar melody accompanied by a steady, mid-tempo drum beat. The music has a major tonality and a positive, energetic vibe. The environmental noise drops to a clean studio-like silence. (4) The song continues with a male vocalist singing in English. The production is polished with high spectral brightness and clear separation between instruments. There are no sudden SFX or dialogue interruptions, creating a consistent rhythmic backdrop for the visual montage. The harmonic tension is low and pleasant.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic travel vlog presented as a 'tutorial' on taking sick leave to go on an autumn trip to Japan. It uses a funny opening interaction as a hook and then transitions into a montage of activities (shopping, eating, sightseeing) that are sarcastically framed as medical 'prescriptions' for recovery. The core appeal lies in the contrast between the man's initial 'illness' and his subsequent energetic enjoyment of Japanese food and culture.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While many brands and locations are shown, they appear to be part of an organic lifestyle vlog rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes fast-paced editing and bright, saturated colors to convey a sense of joy and excitement. The use of ginkgo trees and autumn leaves strongly anchors the video in a specific seasonal context.
